evals.name: list-my-tasks
evals.prompt: Show me all my tasks in Huly that are due this week
evals.expected_output: A list of tasks assigned to the user with due dates within the current week, formatted in Vietnamese with emojis

evals.name: overdue-tasks
evals.prompt: What tasks are overdue? I need to see which ones I'm late on
evals.expected_output: A list of overdue tasks with days late, formatted in Vietnamese

evals.name: create-task
evals.prompt: Create a new task in project DELTA titled 'Test API connection' with medium priority, due tomorrow
evals.expected_output: Confirmation of task creation with task ID and details

evals.name: task-details
evals.prompt: Show me details for task DELTA-1
evals.expected_output: Full task details including title, status, priority, assignee, due date, estimation, project, formatted in Vietnamese

evals.name: daily-report
evals.prompt: Give me a daily report of my tasks
evals.expected_output: Summary of tasks: due today, overdue, in progress, completed, formatted in Vietnamese with emojis
